overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a female character in a red skirt visiting a neon-lit street food stall during a rainy night, then walking along a wet city sidewalk past pedestrians and vehicles. The scene is dominated by cyan and pink neon lighting reflecting off wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk street food stall with cyan neon counter

agents.ego_description: standing at the food stall counter, facing the vendor and looking at the menu

entered.detail: cyan-lit counter with glowing blue base and menu items on display
four vertical white signs with Japanese characters hanging above the counter
white metallic stools lined up along the counter
multiple TV screens displaying advertisements above the stall
rain-slicked pavement reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The character stands stationary at a cyberpunk food stall under a protective awning, sheltered from the light rain. The stall features a glowing cyan counter with vertical menu signs and white bar stools. Neon-lit digital screens hang overhead while the camera slowly orbits around the character, showing the wet pavement and distant street traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city sidewalk with neon billboards and street traffic

events.description: character turns away from the food stall and begins walking down the sidewalk
pedestrians walk past the character on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk away from the food stall, moving deeper into the city

notable_agents.action: man in red jacket and white pants walks past the character from behind
figure walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: multi-lane road with moving traffic and street lamps
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying 'PITBULL OVERKILL'
road barriers with 'SIERRUS COLA' branding and other advertisements
trees with uplighting along the sidewalk edge
yellow taxi cab parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the food stall and proceeds along the rain-soaked sidewalk, now exposed to the light rain. The camera follows from behind as pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction. Large digital billboards and neon signage illuminate the street while vehicles drive past on the right, their headlights reflecting off the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered, stationary moment at a food stall into a walk along a rain-soaked city street. It begins with the camera slowly orbiting a character standing under a protective awning, where a glowing cyan counter and digital screens cast a neon light over the immediate area. As the character steps away from the stall, the scene opens up to the elements, exposing her to the light rain as she proceeds along the wet sidewalk. The camera then follows from behind, moving past oncoming pedestrians while the environment expands to reveal towering digital billboards and the headlights of passing vehicles reflecting off the pavement.
